agent_analysis:
## CRITICAL — Friday Close-Out

### Position Status

| Pos | Dir | Stock Move | Option P&L | Status | Action |
|-----|-----|-----------|------------|--------|--------|
| FTNT | CALL | +7.4% | **+380%** | TARGET HIT | **CLOSE NOW** |
| LULU | PUT | -5.0% | **-99%** | STOP HIT | **CLOSE NOW** |
| AAPL | CALL | +3.7% | **+261%** | TARGET HIT | **CLOSE NOW** |

### Notes

**FTNT (+380%):** Monster winner. +380% on a weekly call is exceptional — gamma worked in our favor all week. Friday target is 10%; this is 38x that. Every minute held past now is pure risk with zero upside justification. Take the money.

**LULU (-99%):** Stock moved -5.0% which should have been directional gold for a put, yet the option is -99%. This is a strike selection or entry timing failure — likely bought far OTM or IV crushed the premium despite the move. The position is effectively worthless. Close for whatever bid exists; even $0.01 is better than expiring to assignment risk.

**AAPL (+261%):** Another strong winner. +261% on day 5 with charm having eaten most extrinsic value means this is deep ITM and largely intrinsic. Bid-ask will widen after 3 PM. Close before 2 PM ET.

### Week Summary

- **2 winners, 1 loser.** Net P&L strongly positive — FTNT and AAPL gains far exceed the LULU wipeout.
- LULU needs post-mortem: a -5% stock drop killing a put at -99% suggests the strike was way OTM or entry was after IV had already priced the move in. Flag for Sunday reflection.

---

## RECOMMENDATION

**CLOSE ALL THREE POSITIONS IMMEDIATELY VIA MARKET ORDERS.** It is Friday — CRITICAL urgency. No exceptions. FTNT and AAPL are massive wins; lock them in before the 3 PM liquidity cliff. LULU is dead; harvest whatever pennies remain. Do not wait.
